title: coleus eungellaensis
intro: Coleus eungellaensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Australia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Coleus eungellaensis are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized.
